frames.armCoordination: screen-left arm forward, screen-right arm back
frames.requiredRead: front-facing running-in-place, not idle bobbing and not local limb warp
occlusionOverlapNotes: helmet ring must remain continuous around hair and face
arms may cross in front of torso but hands cannot merge with hips
raised knee/boot must overlap suit correctly without holes or detached joints
boots must remain readable and must not melt into the green background
